goal: is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k, ord) = (k < ord and a.congr_mod(g.pow(k), n))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { (x0 < x1 and x2.congr_mod(x3.pow(x0), x4)) = is_reduced_power_of_mod(x2, x3, x4, x0, x1) }(k, ord, a, g, n)

goal: is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k, ord) = (k < ord and a.congr_mod(g.pow(k), n))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { (x0 < x1 and x2.congr_mod(x3.pow(x0), x4)) = is_reduced_power_of_mod(x2, x3, x4, x0, x1) }(k, ord, a, g, n)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Nat](ord, 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Nat](ord, 0)

goal: is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, lib(nat).nat_mod(k)(ord), ord) = (lib(nat).nat_mod(k)(ord) < ord and a.congr_mod(g.pow(lib(nat).nat_mod(k)(ord)), n))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { (x0 < x1 and x2.congr_mod(x3.pow(x0), x4)) = is_reduced_power_of_mod(x2, x3, x4, x0, x1) }(lib(nat).nat_mod(k, ord), ord, a, g, n)

goal: is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) = exists(k0: Nat) { a.congr_mod(g.pow(k0), n) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0.congr_mod(x1.pow(k0), x2) } = is_power_of_mod(x0, x1, x2) }(a, g, n)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k0, ord) }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, x0, ord) }(lib(nat).nat_mod(k, ord))

goal: powers_cover_units_mod(g, n) = forall(x0: Nat) { x0.coprime(n) implies is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat) { not x2.coprime(x0) or is_power_of_mod(x2, x1, x0) } = powers_cover_units_mod(x1, x0) }(n, g)

goal: is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) and forall(x0: Nat) { x0.coprime(n) implies is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n) } and a.coprime(n)
forall(x0: Nat) { not x0.coprime(n) or is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n) } = true
function(x0: Nat) { not (x0.coprime(n) and not is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n)) }(a)
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not (x0.coprime(n) and not is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n)) }(a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k0, ord) }

proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(a, n, g.pow(i))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(a, n, g.pow(j))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(g.pow(i), n, g.pow(j))

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k0, ord) }
is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) and is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k, ord)

is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) and is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k, ord) or (not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and k = 0)
not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n)
not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and 0 = 0

is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) and is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, 0, ord) or (not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and 0 = 0)

exists(k0: Nat) { is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) and is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, k0, ord) or (not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and k0 = 0) }

proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not is_multiplicative_order_mod(x0, x1, x2) or not is_power_of_mod(x3, x0, x1) and discrete_log_mod_with_order(x0, x1, x2, x3) = 0 or (is_multiplicative_order_mod(x0, x1, x2) and is_power_of_mod(x3, x0, x1) and is_reduced_power_of_mod(x3, x0, x1, discrete_log_mod_with_order(x0, x1, x2, x3), x2)) }(g, n, ord, a)

goal: not is_multiplicative_order_mod(g, n, ord) or not is_power_of_mod(a, g, n) and discrete_log_mod_with_order(g, n, ord, a) = 0
powers_cover_units_mod(g, n) = forall(x0: Nat) { x0.coprime(n) implies is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat) { not x2.coprime(x0) or is_power_of_mod(x2, x1, x0) } = powers_cover_units_mod(x1, x0) }(n, g)

forall(x0: Nat) { not x0.coprime(n) or is_power_of_mod(x0, g, n) } = true

goal: is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, discrete_log_mod_with_order(g, n, ord, a), ord)
is_reduced_power_of_mod(a, g, n, discrete_log_mod_with_order(g, n, ord, a), ord)
